prompt: A vintage travel poster illustration for {argument name="destination" default="Malta"}, designed like a mid-century Mediterranean tourism advertisement with elegant painterly realism and slightly textured printed-poster grain. At the top center, place the large headline {argument name="headline text" default="MALTA"} in oversized cream serif capitals, with the subtitle {argument name="subtitle text" default="MEDITERRANEAN PARADISE"} directly below in smaller dark navy sans-serif capitals. Show a sunlit coastal road curving along a stone waterfront in Valletta, viewed from slightly above and behind a classic white 1960s sedan driving away from the viewer in the lower left foreground; the rear license plate reads {argument name="license plate" default="MTA 1964"}. Across the harbor, depict warm honey-colored limestone buildings climbing the hillside, including 1 large domed church, 1 tall narrow church spire, rows of historic townhouses with several colorful enclosed wooden balconies, and distant city walls stretching across the opposite shoreline. In the bay, include exactly 3 traditional Maltese fishing boats in vivid blue, yellow, red, and green, plus 2 tiny white sailboats farther back. Add exactly 4 white seagulls flying across a brilliant turquoise-blue sky with soft white clouds. Frame the whole composition with dark leafy trees and abundant bright magenta bougainvillea blossoms arching in from the top and right edges, with more flowers in the lower right corner, creating a lush border around the scene. Include a palm tree among the waterfront buildings and a spiky agave plant in the lower left foreground. Use warm golden sunlight, saturated coastal colors, romantic vacation-poster composition, clean readable typography, and a nostalgic, idealized Mediterranean atmosphere.
translatedPrompt: 一张复古旅行海报插画，主题为 {argument name="destination" default="马耳他"}，设计风格参考 20 世纪中叶的地中海旅游广告，具有优雅的绘画写实感和轻微的印刷海报颗粒质感。在顶部中央，放置大号标题 {argument name="headline text" default="MALTA"}，使用超大号奶油色衬线大写字母；下方紧邻副标题 {argument name="subtitle text" default="MEDITERRANEAN PARADISE"}，使用较小的深海军蓝无衬线大写字母。画面展示瓦莱塔阳光明媚的沿海公路，沿着石质海滨蜿蜒，视角略高于并位于一辆经典的 1960 年代白色轿车后方，轿车正驶离画面，位于左下角前景；车牌显示为 {argument name="license plate" default="MTA 1964"}。在港口对面，描绘爬满山坡的暖蜂蜜色石灰岩建筑，包括 1 座大型圆顶教堂、1 座高耸狭窄的教堂尖塔、成排的历史联排别墅（带有多个色彩鲜艳的封闭式木制阳台），以及延伸至对岸的远方城墙。在海湾中，包含 3 艘色彩鲜艳（蓝、黄、红、绿）的传统马耳他渔船，以及远处 2 艘微小的白色帆船。在明亮的绿松石色天空中，加入 4 只飞翔的白色海鸥，并点缀柔软的白云。整个构图由深色枝叶茂密的树木和从顶部及右侧边缘拱起的繁茂亮洋红色三角梅框架，右下角也有更多花朵，在场景周围形成郁郁葱葱的边框。在海滨建筑群中加入一棵棕榈树，并在左下角前景处放置一株尖刺状的龙舌兰植物。运用温暖的金色阳光、饱和的海岸色彩、浪漫的度假海报构图、清晰易读的排版，营造出一种怀旧且理想化的地中海氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 复古马耳他旅行海报：此提示词可生成一张怀旧风格的马耳他旅游插画海报，包含醒目的标题文字、沿海公路、经典汽车、港口船只以及阳光明媚的历史建筑，适用于旅游品牌推广或墙面装饰艺术。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；要求可读；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；要求可读；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
